caption: Trackball Promo
desc: A simple pinball game to promote the product. The user had to get the ball past the rotating padd;es into the  cradle.

caption: Dock Selector
desc: A prototype to find a dock for a particular computer. When any combination of brand, model, series (from the menus) were selected the recommended result would appear below.

caption: Spec-Sheet 2 Excel
desc: A convenient way for Managers to enter spec-sheet information about a product, and converting it to an excel file (sent to translation).

caption: Project Planner
desc: A prototype for an  approval process between teams during the development cycle.

caption: Animated Background
desc: An animated background without the HTML Canvas feature. The shapes fade in and out at random sizes and locations.

caption: Shopsi
desc: A simple shopping list for Android devices. You can set the minimum quantity threshold. When items are below the threshold, a filter icon is displayed which shows only the low item inventory. Note: Google Play store has removed this app.

caption: Adelli
desc: A bucket list for Android devices. Users can create an item and add a picture from their device's photo gallery. When an item has been completed it is disabled. Note: Google Play store has removed this app.

caption: Wordoot
desc: A word search game for Android devices. It saves the player's current and best times. The words are randomly arranged up, down, left, right, diagonal or in reverse order.  Note: Google Play store has removed this app.

caption: Clue
desc: A prototype game using EaselJS. A word hint is show at the bottom of the screen. The user must click the images related to the hint. SoundJS was used to provide audio, and PreloadJS was used to load all the assets.

caption: Animated Tiles
desc: A prototype for randomly animating a collection of logos.

caption: Email Template Selector
desc: A tool for choosing an email template, supplying content and submitting the information to the Marketing team.

caption: Creative Capacity Graph
desc: A chart that showed the number of requests, type of request, and the number of requests over the quota for the week. A dashboard was also created for Project Managers to enter the data.

caption: Online Approvals
desc: An online approval tool which allowed Project Managers to select team members for a project with following roles: the Requestor (Marketing Dept.), Graphic Designer, Project Manager and Art Director. When the project was created, the team members received an email with a link to this project. If a comment was added, the team would be notified. Team members could optionally choose not to receive notifications. When each team member marked their task as completed, a checkmark and date stamp appeared by their names. When all members completed their tasks the project was closed automatically. Users could search for past projects (read-only).

caption: 9iAS Portal Banner
desc: A vertical banner which used ClickTag. The requirement was to keep the banner under 10kb, yet show the different features of 9iAS. The solution was to load a movie when clicked that feature.

translatedBy: Content was translated with Google Translate
